headline: Foundayo™ (orforglipron), Lilly's new oral GLP-1 pill for weight loss, now available in the U.S.
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) today announced that Foundayo™ (orforglipron) is now available to adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems following the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approval on April 1, 2026. When used alongside a reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity, Foundayo helps individuals lose excess body weight and keep the weight off. Foundayo is a once-daily pill for weight loss that can be taken without food or water restrictio

headline: Amazon Pharmacy to Offer Eli Lilly and Company’s New GLP-1 Pill Foundayo via Same-Day Delivery
summary: SEATTLE, April 09, 2026--Amazon Pharmacy (NASDAQ: AMZN), a full-service digital pharmacy that offers fast medication delivery directly to customers' homes, now offers Eli Lilly and Company’s recently approved GLP-1 medication, Foundayo™, a once daily oral treatment for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems.

content.title: Amazon Pharmacy to Offer Eli Lilly and Company’s New GLP-1 Pill Foundayo via Same-Day Delivery
content.summary: SEATTLE, April 09, 2026--Amazon Pharmacy (NASDAQ: AMZN), a full-service digital pharmacy that offers fast medication delivery directly to customers' homes, now offers Eli Lilly and Company’s recently approved GLP-1 medication, Foundayo™, a once daily oral treatment for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems.

thumbnail.caption: Customers with a valid prescription can order Foundayo through Amazon Pharmacy, see real-time medication availability and transparent pricing, and receive fast medication delivery directly to their door nationwide.

headline: GoodRx Expands Access to Eli Lilly and Company’s New Oral GLP-1, Foundayo™, and Zepbound® KwikPen® with Self-Pay Pricing at More Than 70,000 Pharmacies Nationwide
summary: SANTA MONICA, Calif., April 09, 2026--GoodRx (Nasdaq: GDRX), the leading platform for prescription savings in the U.S., today announced that it is working with Eli Lilly and Company to expand access to the newly FDA-approved oral GLP-1 medication, Foundayo™ (orforglipron). Eligible self-pay patients can access Foundayo through GoodRx at a starting price of $149 per month, in line with the lowest available discounted cash price at launch. The offering provides transparent pricing and nationwide p

headline: RO OFFERS ELI LILLY'S FOUNDAYO™, THE NEWEST GLP-1 INNOVATION
summary: Ro, the leading direct-to-patient healthcare company, today announced eligible patients can now access Foundayo™ (orforglipron) – Eli Lilly Company's newest oral GLP-1 innovation – on the Ro platform, adding to Ro's already comprehensive formulary of FDA-approved GLP-1s. Foundayo™ is a once daily oral treatment for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems.

Foundayo™ is a once daily oral treatment for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related medical problems.

headline: Eli Lilly’s Foundayo Weight-Loss Pill Hits the Shelves. It’s a Turning Point for the Stock.
summary: Eli Lilly made progress in its battle for weight-loss dominance Thursday, releasing its daily GLP-1 pill broadly through pharmacies and telehealth providers.  Foundayo, Lilly’s once-daily oral medication for chronic weight management, is now available through platforms including GoodRx, Amazon Pharmacy, and Weight Watchers.  Lilly also offers the pill through LillyDirect, the drugmaker’s direct-to-consumer platform.

content.title: Eli Lilly’s Foundayo Weight-Loss Pill Hits the Shelves. It’s a Turning Point for the Stock.

Foundayo, Lilly’s once-daily oral medication for chronic weight management, is now available through platforms including GoodRx, Amazon Pharmacy, and Weight Watchers.  Lilly also offers the pill through LillyDirect, the drugmaker’s direct-to-consumer platform.

headline: Eli Lilly Expands Foundayo Access With Retail And Telehealth Partners
summary: Eli Lilly’s oral obesity pill Foundayo, approved by the FDA in early April 2026, is now rolling out broadly across the U.S. The drug is available through Amazon Pharmacy, GoodRx, Weight Watchers programs, Ro’s telehealth platform, and traditional retail pharmacies. These partnerships expand same day or next day home delivery, transparent cash pricing, and integrated medical weight management support. Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) is pushing deeper into obesity care with Foundayo now moving quickly...

headline: What Novo Nordisk (CPSE:NOVO B)'s Higher-Dose, Lower-Priced Wegovy Move Means For Shareholders
summary: In recent weeks, Novo Nordisk has rolled out a higher-dose 7.2 mg Wegovy injection in the US at a lower monthly price than Eli Lilly’s competing Zepbound, while the European Medicines Agency has approved more flexible, higher-temperature delivery for Wegovy shipments across Europe. Together, these changes strengthen Wegovy’s convenience and cost positioning in the obesity market at a time when oral GLP-1 competition and pricing pressures are intensifying. We’ll now examine how this...
